category_sources: source_facts.description says LispKit is a Scheme framework for extension and scripting languages on macOS and iOS; official LispPad site describes LispKit as its Scheme interpreter.

docs_sources: Official LispPad site hosts LispKit library reference pages; lispkit-core is an official LispKit documentation entry point.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo lookup skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Scheme framework for scripting; official LispPad pages describe LispKit libraries and interpreter usage.
